text:
Created attachment 225900
Upgrade to 0.21.1

A small upgrade after the very recent upgrade to 0.21. 
Tested on poudriere for amd64 (13, 12.2 and 11.4) and aarch64 (13.0).

Changelog ( https://sw.kovidgoyal.net/kitty/changelog.html#id1 )
- Fix a regression in the previous release that could cause a crash when changing layouts and mousing
